structs.name: RendererRoot

fields.name: pDeviceProperties
fields.comment: Bethesda name from error strings. DXGI device/factory wrapper; +0x408 = IDXGIFactory2*

fields.name: renderCmdContext
fields.comment: Render command context; +0x30 -> command queue allocator struct

structs.comment: Actual size unknown, at least 0xB8. Bethesda internal name may be part of a 'deviceProperties' hierarchy.

structs.name: DeviceProperties

fields.name: pAGSContext
fields.comment: AMD GPU Services context from agsInitialize (NULL on non-AMD)

fields.name: gpuVendorName
fields.comment: char[64] from GPU desc vendor string

fields.name: gpuName
fields.comment: char[64] GPU name from adapter desc (registered as 'gpu_name' condition var)

fields.name: formatSupportTable
fields.comment: 0x79 * 3 bytes = per-format support flags from CheckFeatureSupport(FORMAT_SUPPORT)

fields.name: pDxDevice
fields.comment: ID3D12Device*; Bethesda: arDeviceProperties.pDxDevice. Created via AGS or D3D12CreateDevice.

structs.comment: Bethesda name: arDeviceProperties. Central D3D12/DXGI device properties struct. At least 0x590 bytes. Holds factory, adapter, device, GPU caps, format support, and display info.

structs.name: GameSwapChainWrapper

fields.name: hwnd
fields.comment: HWND for this swap chain's window

fields.name: pDeviceProperties
fields.comment: Back-pointer to the DXGI device wrapper (RendererRoot+0x30)

fields.name: pDxSwapChain
fields.comment: IDXGISwapChain3/4* (QI'd from CreateSwapChainForHwnd result). Bethesda name: pSwapChain->pDxSwapChain

structs.comment: Allocated as 0xD8 bytes. Bethesda name: pSwapChain (from error strings). Wraps IDXGISwapChain3/4 with buffer management.

globals.name: g_RendererRoot
globals.comment: Global pointer to renderer root struct. Accessed via REL::ID(944397)

globals.name: g_EngineState
globals.comment: Engine state object; +0x98/+0x99 checked early in shutdown

globals.name: g_SceneManager
globals.comment: Scene/world manager; accessed at +0xb0, +0x5a8, +0x5d0, +0x580 during shutdown

globals.name: g_RenderDeviceManager
globals.comment: Render device manager; +0x454 zeroed at shutdown start

globals.name: g_ShutdownTimerContext
globals.comment: Used with QueryPerformanceCounter for shutdown timeout watchdog

globals.name: g_RenderThreadState
globals.comment: Render thread state; +0x3960 set to 1 (with LOCK) to signal shutdown

globals.name: g_RenderPipelineManager
globals.comment: Complex object with multiple vtables reset during shutdown

globals.name: g_RenderResourceGroup
globals.comment: Has child resources at [2],[3],[4] cleaned via FUN_1427dc000

globals.name: g_TaskScheduler
globals.comment: Accessed at +0x10, +0x40 during shutdown

globals.name: g_WorldInstance
globals.comment: Accessed at +0x10, +0x40, +0x580 during shutdown

globals.name: g_InputManager
globals.comment: Destroyed with arg=1; +0x2a set to 0 early; +0x40 cleaned

globals.name: g_MenuManager
globals.comment: Destroyed with arg=1 during shutdown

globals.name: g_UIRenderer
globals.comment: Accessed at +0x50 for cleanup during shutdown

globals.name: g_CameraManager
globals.comment: Passed to FUN_1418bfb20 and FUN_1418bf970 during shutdown

globals.name: g_ScaleformManager
globals.comment: Manages Scaleform/GFx movie loading and events

globals.name: g_ScaleformRenderer
globals.comment: Passed to Scaleform movie load functions (FUN_1425442b0)

globals.name: g_JobCompletionTable
globals.comment: Job/task completion lookup; +0xdc=max entries, +0x8=status array, +0xf0=result data

globals.name: g_RenderThreadPool
globals.comment: +0xf0 set to thread count during init

globals.name: g_PostLoadCallbackManager
globals.comment: +0x18=initialized flag, +0x20/+0x28=callback array A, +0x30/+0x38=callback array B

globals.name: g_GameStateManager
globals.comment: +0x310 checked as a flag during state transitions

globals.name: g_ConditionVarSystem
globals.comment: Used with 'loading_menu' / 'Is loading screen open' string

globals.name: g_WorldRenderer
globals.comment: +0x168 -> object with +0xa8 set to 1 during scene load

globals.name: g_NumRenderThreads
globals.comment: Thread count clamped to min 1, stored to g_RenderThreadPool+0xf0

globals.name: g_DisplayTargetCount
globals.comment: Number of display targets/HWNDs in g_DisplayTargetArray

globals.name: g_DisplayTargetArray
globals.comment: Array of display target identifiers (HWNDs?); searched during swap chain init

globals.name: g_SwapChainConfigByte
globals.comment: Single byte copied into swap chain descriptor at +0x29

globals.name: IID_IDXGISwapChain3or4
globals.comment: GUID used for QueryInterface on the swap chain after creation

globals.name: g_bD3D12DebugLayerEnabled
globals.comment: When set, calls D3D12GetDebugInterface during device init

globals.name: g_bResourceTierBasic
globals.comment: Set if GPU resource tier is 0 or 10; cleared otherwise

globals.name: g_bAGSDeviceCreated
globals.comment: Set to 1 if AGS CreateDevice succeeded with bit 4 flag

globals.name: g_GraphicsQualityPreset
globals.comment: Registered as 'graphics.quality' condition var

globals.name: IID_ID3D12Debug3
globals.comment: GUID for D3D12GetDebugInterface primary attempt

globals.name: IID_ID3D12Debug
globals.comment: GUID for D3D12GetDebugInterface fallback

globals.name: IID_IDXGIFactory
globals.comment: GUID passed to CreateDXGIFactory2

globals.name: IID_IDXGIAdapter
globals.comment: GUID passed to EnumAdapterByGpuPreference

globals.name: IID_IDXGIOutput1
globals.comment: GUID for QI from IDXGIOutput to IDXGIOutput1 (for GetDisplayModeList1)

globals.name: IID_ID3D12Device_Probe
globals.comment: GUID used for D3D12CreateDevice during adapter probing

globals.name: IID_IDXGIAdapter3or4
globals.comment: GUID for QI adapter to pDxActiveGPU

globals.name: IID_DriverVersion
globals.comment: GUID passed to adapter CheckInterfaceSupport for driver version

globals.name: IID_ID3D12Device
globals.comment: GUID for final D3D12CreateDevice (non-AGS path)

globals.name: IID_DeviceQI_A
globals.comment: GUID for QI on ID3D12Device -> pDeviceQI_A (+0x580)

globals.name: IID_DeviceQI_B
globals.comment: GUID for fallback QI on ID3D12Device -> pDeviceQI_B (+0x588)

globals.name: g_BackBufferFormatCode
globals.comment: Char code selecting DXGI_FORMAT: '$'=R8G8B8A8, ')'=R10G10B10A2, '>'=B8G8R8A8(?), 'M'=R16G16B16A16_FLOAT

globals.name: g_AnimationManager
globals.comment: Accessed at +0x58 during shutdown

globals.name: g_AudioManager
globals.comment: Destroyed during late shutdown

globals.name: g_NiObjectPool
globals.comment: Cleaned with FUN_14061f620(+0x1c0), freed with aligned dealloc(0x200, 0x40)

globals.name: g_ResourceManager
globals.comment: Accessed at +0x600 during cleanup

globals.name: g_D3DDeviceContext
globals.comment: Destroyed near end of shutdown after FUN_1427d70b0(+8)

globals.name: g_SwapChainManager
globals.comment: Destroyed near end of shutdown, adjacent to g_RendererRoot

globals.name: g_RenderTargetManager
globals.comment: Destroyed near end of shutdown, adjacent to g_SwapChainManager

globals.name: g_bQuickExitRequested
globals.comment: If set, calls quick_exit(0) during shutdown

globals.name: g_bSkipDebuggerCheck
globals.comment: Bypasses IsDebuggerPresent check for SHUTDOWN CLEAN message

globals.name: g_bProfilingEnabled
globals.comment: Controls profiling data cleanup during shutdown

globals.name: g_ShutdownTimeoutScale
globals.comment: Multiplied by 30000.0 for shutdown timeout (QueryPerformanceCounter)

globals.name: g_D3DDevice
globals.comment: Called with vtable+0x10 for cleanup, then destroyed

globals.name: g_GPUMemoryManager
globals.comment: Destroyed near end of shutdown

globals.name: g_WndProcContext
globals.comment: WndProc context pointer; +0x60=app state, +0x70->mouse input obj (+0x8c/+0x90=mouseX/Y), +0x88->IME callback obj

globals.name: g_bInputEnabled
globals.comment: Gates WM_INPUT, WM_CHAR, WM_MOUSEMOVE processing in MainWndProc

globals.name: g_bCursorVisible
globals.comment: Controls cursor show/hide in WM_SETCURSOR; when set + outside client area, shows cursor

globals.name: g_bCursorShown
globals.comment: Tracks ShowCursor state; toggled by MainWndProc WM_SETCURSOR handler

globals.name: g_CharInputDispatcher
globals.comment: Character input dispatch; +0xb50=input slot array (0x30 each, max 15), +0x1288=lock, +0x1290/+0x1298=linked list head/tail

globals.name: g_bSuppressActivation
globals.comment: When nonzero, blocks InputManager_HandleActivation on WM_ACTIVATE

globals.name: g_bBlockSysCommands
globals.comment: When set, blocks SC_SCREENSAVE and SC_MONITORPOWER regardless of app state

globals.name: g_DebugLogger
globals.comment: Logger instance passed to DebugLogPrintf for condition/debug output

globals.name: g_GameTimeContext
globals.comment: +0x30 -> object where +0x48 is a time value; used in menu timer expiry (multiplied by 24.0)

functions.name: ApplyUpscalingSettingsChange
functions.comment: Handles upscaling/VRS/FSR2 setting changes and submits render commands

functions.name: Engine_ProcessStateTransition
functions.comment: Handles loading screens, scene transitions, Scaleform UI, and render command submission for scene loads. Not renderer HW init.

functions.name: Engine_Shutdown
functions.comment: Full engine shutdown sequence. Tears down all subsystem singletons, flushes render commands, cleans up D3D resources. Contains string 'SHUTDOWN CLEAN'.

functions.name: PostLoop_Cleanup
functions.comment: Called ONCE after main game loop exits, before Engine_Shutdown. NOT per-frame.

functions.name: GameMain
functions.comment: Top-level entry: SetPriorityClass, CoInitialize, runs MainGameLoop, then PostLoop_Cleanup + Engine_Shutdown

functions.name: Engine_InitAndRun
functions.comment: NOT a frame loop. Massive linear init of all subsystems, registers frame callbacks on engine singleton, then enters blocking message pump via virtual call at end. Returns when game should exit.

functions.name: Renderer_InitSwapChainWrapper
functions.comment: Contains the call site hooked by SwapChainWrapperHook at +0x130

functions.name: Renderer_CreateSwapChainForHwnd
functions.comment: Calls IDXGIFactory2::CreateSwapChainForHwnd, MakeWindowAssociation, and QI to IDXGISwapChain3/4. Allocates 0xD8-byte GameSwapChainWrapper.

functions.name: SwapChain_BuildDXGIDesc
functions.comment: Builds DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1 from GameSwapChainWrapper fields

functions.name: SwapChain_PostCreate
functions.comment: Post-creation setup after CreateSwapChainForHwnd succeeds

functions.name: MemAlloc
functions.comment: Allocates memory (used for 0xD8-byte swap chain wrapper)

functions.name: FormatHRESULTError
functions.comment: Stores HRESULT error context string for diagnostics

functions.name: ReportDXGIError
functions.comment: Reports DXGI HRESULT errors with context string

functions.name: DeviceProperties_InitD3D12
functions.comment: Core D3D12 init: debug layer, CreateDXGIFactory2, adapter enum, D3D12CreateDevice (with AGS path for AMD), feature queries, format support check. Populates DeviceProperties struct.

functions.name: DeviceProperties_EnumAdaptersAndOutputs
functions.comment: Creates IDXGIFactory2, enumerates adapters (GPU preference=HIGH_PERF), outputs, monitors, and display modes. Populates pDeviceProperties+0x3E8 array.

functions.name: AdapterInfo_Cleanup
functions.comment: Cleans up a 0x48-byte adapter info entry

functions.name: AdapterInfo_CopyConstruct
functions.comment: Copy-constructs a 0x48-byte adapter info entry into the array

functions.name: AdapterInfoArray_Grow
functions.comment: Grows the adapter info array when at capacity

functions.name: DXGIWrapper_QuerySwapChain
functions.comment: Queries existing swap chain state from the DXGI device wrapper

functions.name: SwapChain_BuildConfig
functions.comment: Builds swap chain config struct from params before creation

functions.name: DXGIWrapper_ReleaseSwapChain
functions.comment: Releases/destroys an existing swap chain

functions.name: SwapChain_PreCreate
functions.comment: Pre-creation setup called before DXGIWrapper_CreateSwapChain

functions.name: DXGIWrapper_CreateSwapChain
functions.comment: Creates and configures a new swap chain on the DXGI device wrapper

functions.name: DXGIWrapper_FinalizeSwapChain
functions.comment: Finalization after swap chain creation/reuse

functions.name: SwapChain_RegisterOutput
functions.comment: Registers the swap chain output with the rendering pipeline

functions.name: SetShutdownPhase
functions.comment: Sets current shutdown phase ID (breadcrumb for crash reporting)

functions.name: SaveAndSetShutdownPhase
functions.comment: Saves current phase to out-param, then sets new phase ID

functions.name: GetShutdownPhase
functions.comment: Returns current shutdown phase ID

functions.name: UnregisterAndCleanup
functions.comment: Cleanup/deregister helper called extensively during shutdown

functions.name: ReleaseRef
functions.comment: Release a reference (part of ref-counting system)

functions.name: FreeAllocation
functions.comment: Free/deallocate memory

functions.name: FlushBeforeDestroy
functions.comment: Flush/finalize an object before destruction; called with (ptr, 1)

functions.name: RenderCmd_SceneLoad_Execute
functions.comment: Callback for scene load render command (submitted from Engine_ProcessStateTransition)

functions.name: RegisterConditionVar
functions.comment: Registers a named condition variable; called with ('loading_menu', 'Is loading screen open')

functions.name: RegisterConditionVarDirect
functions.comment: Registers a condition var with direct value; used for 'graphics.quality', 'driver_version', 'gpu_name'

functions.name: GetDXGIFormatForIndex
functions.comment: Maps format index (0-0x78) to DXGI_FORMAT enum value for format support checking

functions.name: SortGPUDescriptors
functions.comment: Sorts GPU descriptors by preference; called after adapter enumeration

functions.name: RendererRoot_ApplyDeviceCaps
functions.comment: Applies device capabilities from DeviceProperties to RendererRoot fields

functions.name: ScaleformNotifyMovie
functions.comment: Notifies/invokes on a Scaleform movie; 3rd arg = event type (2=common)

functions.name: ScaleformLoadMovie
functions.comment: Loads a Scaleform/GFx movie; returns success char

functions.name: RenderCmd_Shutdown_Execute
functions.comment: Callback for the shutdown render command submitted via AllocRenderCommand

functions.name: Renderer_Cleanup
functions.comment: Called near end of shutdown after WSACleanup

functions.name: Renderer_FinalCleanup
functions.comment: Called after Renderer_Cleanup during shutdown

functions.name: CleanupNiNodePool
functions.comment: Called with string 'BSFaceGenNiNode' during shutdown

functions.name: MainWndProc
functions.comment: Main window procedure (WNDPROC). Handles WM_CREATE, WM_DESTROY, WM_ACTIVATE, WM_SETCURSOR, WM_WINDOWPOSCHANGED, WM_DISPLAYCHANGE, WM_INPUT, WM_CHAR, WM_IME_COMPOSITION, WM_SYSCOMMAND, WM_MOUSEMOVE

functions.name: InputManager_HandleActivation
functions.comment: Called on WM_ACTIVATE; handles focus gain/loss for input system

functions.name: ProcessRawInput
functions.comment: Processes WM_INPUT raw input messages

functions.name: DispatchCharInput
functions.comment: Dispatches a character input event; called from WM_CHAR after codepage conversion

functions.name: WindowRect_SetPosition
functions.comment: Sets position on a rect object; called with (g_AudioManager+0x10, x, y) from WM_WINDOWPOSCHANGED

functions.name: WindowRect_SetClientSize
functions.comment: Sets client size on a rect object; called with (g_AudioManager+0x10, w, h) after AdjustWindowRectEx

functions.name: WindowRect_OnDisplayChange
functions.comment: Updates rect object on WM_DISPLAYCHANGE; called with g_AudioManager+0x10

functions.name: WindowRect_SetActive
functions.comment: Sets active/focus state; called with (g_AudioManager+0x10, 0) on WM_ACTIVATE deactivation

functions.name: ConditionFunc_IsInWorkshopMode
functions.comment: Condition callback; loads workshop Scaleform movie, returns 1.0f if loaded, 0.0f if not

functions.name: GetScaleformMoviePath
functions.comment: Returns a movie name/path string for ScaleformLoadMovie; called from condition funcs

functions.name: DebugLogPrintf
functions.comment: Printf-style debug/console logger; first arg is logger instance

functions.name: ScaleformManager_UpdateMenus
functions.comment: Two-pass menu array update + 60fps frame timing. param_1+0x2f0=menu count, +0x2f8=menu ptr array. Each menu: +0x50 bit0=active, +0xb8 bit7=needs movie check

functions.name: Menu_UpdatePassA
functions.comment: First-pass update for a Scaleform menu element

functions.name: Menu_UpdatePassB
functions.comment: Second-pass update for a Scaleform menu element

functions.name: GetMenuMoviePath_Primary
functions.comment: Returns primary movie path for Scaleform menu load check

functions.name: GetMenuMoviePath_Fallback
functions.comment: Returns fallback movie path when primary movie fails to load

functions.name: GetElapsedTimeSeconds
functions.comment: Returns elapsed time as float seconds; used for 60fps frame gating in menu update

functions.name: Menu_SubmitFrameUpdate
functions.comment: Submits per-frame menu update; args: type=5, menu obj, frame number

functions.name: Menu_OnTimerExpired
functions.comment: Called when menu timer allocation is freed (bVar6=true path)

functions.name: AtomicCounter_Acquire
functions.comment: Acquires/increments an atomic counter; paired with atomic decrement + WakeByAddressSingle

functions.name: GetEngineSingleton
functions.comment: Returns the main engine/application singleton. Frame callbacks registered at +0x98, etc.

functions.name: GetAppRunnerSingleton
functions.comment: Returns app runner object. Callback at +0x08, +0xC0 used. vtable[1] at end of init enters blocking loop.

functions.name: GetMessagePumpSingleton
functions.comment: Returns message pump object. vtable[1] call enters the blocking frame/message loop.

functions.name: FrameTick_Callback
functions.comment: Registered on engine singleton at +0x98. Likely the per-frame update/tick callback. KEY TARGET for render hook.

functions.name: FrameRender_Callback
functions.comment: Registered on app runner at +0x08. Likely per-frame render callback.

functions.name: FrameUpdate_Registered
functions.comment: Registered via FUN_1424b95a0 as a callback during init.

functions.name: PreLoop_Callback
functions.comment: Registered as a pre-loop callback via the event dispatch system during early init.

functions.name: CreateWindowAndInput
functions.comment: Creates the game window; return value passed to FUN_141883e40 to create g_InputManager.

functions.name: InputManager_Create
functions.comment: Creates the input manager from window handle; result stored in g_InputManager.

functions.name: UIRenderer_Create
functions.comment: Creates the UI renderer object (0x580 bytes, 0x80 aligned); stored in g_UIRenderer.

functions.name: GetRenderContext
functions.comment: Returns a render context object; +0x2c0 used for render target setup, +0x8b0 stores render target ptr.

functions.name: GetRenderScheduler
functions.comment: Returns the render task scheduler. Called many times during init for registering render subsystems.

functions.name: RenderScheduler_Init
functions.comment: Initializes the render task scheduler.

functions.name: CheckMinimumGPURequirements
functions.comment: Returns 0 if GPU doesn't meet minimum specs; triggers 'Graphics card does not meet...' MessageBox.

functions.name: GetFrameSyncManager
functions.comment: Returns frame synchronization manager.

functions.name: InitInputSystem
functions.comment: Initializes the input system during Engine_InitAndRun.

functions.name: PostInitInputSystem
functions.comment: Post-initialization for input system; returns value used by subsequent render init.

functions.name: InitRenderPipeline_A
functions.comment: Render pipeline init phase A during Engine_InitAndRun.

functions.name: InitRenderPipeline_B
functions.comment: Render pipeline init phase B during Engine_InitAndRun.

functions.name: InitRenderPipeline_C
functions.comment: Render pipeline init phase C during Engine_InitAndRun.

functions.name: EngineState_StartLoop
functions.comment: Called with g_EngineState near end of init; may signal the engine to start the frame loop.

functions.name: GPUMemoryManager_PostInit
functions.comment: Post-init for GPU memory manager; called with g_GPUMemoryManager+0x140 if DAT_145f4b3d0 set.

functions.name: g_MainThreadId
functions.comment: Stores GetCurrentThreadId() at start of Engine_InitAndRun

functions.name: g_GameMainParam1
functions.comment: First param stored from GameMain

functions.name: g_GameMainParam3
functions.comment: Third param stored from GameMain

functions.name: g_RenderThreadManager
functions.comment: Render thread management singleton; initialized during Engine_InitAndRun

functions.name: g_NameComponentManager
functions.comment: Name component manager for entities; initialized during Engine_InitAndRun

functions.name: g_RenderObjectPool
functions.comment: Render object pool singleton; initialized during Engine_InitAndRun

functions.name: g_bEngineInitComplete
functions.comment: Set to 1 after core engine init, before subsystem startup in Engine_InitAndRun

functions.name: g_VolumetricLightingCallback
functions.comment: Callback for volumetric lighting system

functions.name: g_bRenderSettingsInitialized
functions.comment: Guards one-time init of render settings buffer (0x590 + 0x148 bytes)
